skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

    <name>acp-router</name>
    <description>Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.</description>

compactionCheckpoints.summary:
## Goal
Create a pixel-style Astro blog theme (功能对标 vhAstro-Theme) and deploy it to GitHub Pages at https://3229154448.github.io/pixel-astro-blog/, then redesign it to match a specific reference HTML template's layout, color scheme, and typography.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Pixel art aesthetic: hard shadows (no blur), thick borders (3-4px solid), zero border-radius, image-rendering: pixelated
- Reference HTML template provided (PixelBlog) — warm light theme with specific colors
- Every modification must be built, verified, and deployed to GitHub
- Font: Press Start 2P (titles) + ZCOOL KuaiLe (body, replacing VT323)
- Color scheme: warm light bg `#e8e0d5`, dark text `#1a1a2e`, red accent `#e74c3c`, green secondary `#27ae60`
- Layout: horizontal article cards (left image, right text), rich sidebar with stats/social/categories/tags/music
- Banner: green bg with floating decorative squares + pixel avatar + typewriter + CRT scanlines + pixel grid bg

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Created full Astro blog project with 47+ source files (components, layouts, pages, styles, content)
- [x] Built successfully (23 pages, ~428KB)
- [x] Deployed to GitHub: repo `3229154448/pixel-astro-blog`, GitHub Pages enabled with Actions
- [x] Configured `base: '/pixel-astro-blog'` and `site: 'https://3229154448.github.io/pixel-astro-blog'`
- [x] GitHub Actions builds succeeded (2 runs confirmed)
- [x] Subagent partially updated 4 style files (Base.less, Article.less, ArticleBase.less, About.less) toward warm light theme — builds successfully

### In Progress
- [ ] Redesigning all components to match reference HTML template (only style files partially done, components NOT yet updated)
- [ ] Need to update: Head.astro (font URL), Header.astro, MainHeader.astro, ArticleCard.astro, Aside.astro, Footer.astro, BackTop.astro, Search.astro, Pagination.astro, Archive.astro, MobileSidebar.astro, 404.astro, PageLayout.astro, config.ts

### Blocked
- (none currently, build passes)

## Key Decisions
- **Dark→Light theme shift**: Reference HTML uses warm beige `#e8e0d5` background, not dark theme
- **ZCOOL KuaiLe font**: Replaces VT323 for body text per reference template
- **Horizontal article cards**: Left image (2/5 width) + right content (3/5) instead of vertical stack
- **Rich sidebar**: Stats counters, social icon buttons, category list with counts, tag cloud (multi-color), recommended posts with thumbnails, music player, ad slot
- **CRT + grid effects**: Scanline overlay and pixel grid background on body
- **Green banner**: `#27ae60` background with floating colored squares animation

## Next Steps
1. Update `src/components/Head/Head.astro` — change font URL to include ZCOOL KuaiLe
2. Update `src/components/Header/Header.astro` — new nav bar with logo box, glitch effect, nav-link underline animation, colored action buttons
3. Update `src/components/MainHeader/MainHeader.astro` — green banner, floating squares, pixel avatar, CRT lines, two CTA buttons
4. Update `src/components/ArticleCard/ArticleCard.astro` — horizontal layout (left image/right text), pin/rec badges, read/word badges on image overlay, category badge, blue "阅读" button
5. Update `src/components/Aside/Aside.astro` — full sidebar: profile card with stats, categories with counts, tag cloud (multi-color), recommended posts with thumbnails, music player, ad placeholder
6. Update `src/layouts/PageLayout/PageLayout.astro` — add announcement bar (yellow left-border)
7. Update remaining components: Footer, BackTop, Search, Pagination, Archive, MobileSidebar, 404
8. Update `src/config.ts` — new theme colors matching reference
9. Run `pnpm build` to verify
10. Push to GitHub: `git add . && git commit -m "🎨 重构为暖色浅底像素风主题" && git push https://3229154448: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@github.com/3229154448/pixel-astro-blog.git main`

## Critical Context
- Project path: `/root/.openclaw/workspace-main/pixel-astro-blog/`
- GitHub repo: `3229154448/pixel-astro-blog`
- GitHub token: `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`
- Push URL: `https://3229154448: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@github.com/3229154448/pixel-astro-blog.git`
- Site URL: `https://3229154448.github.io/pixel-astro-blog/`
- Astro config has `base: '/pixel-astro-blog'`
- Style files already partially updated (Base.less, Article.less, ArticleBase.less, About.less have warm light theme vars) but components still reference old dark theme classes/colors
- The 4 style files have 695 lines of changes toward the new design but components need matching updates
- Reference HTML template key CSS variables are documented in the subagent task description above

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user sent untrusted metadata with label/id "openclaw-control-ui". The assistant is working on modifying a pixel-astro-blog project with a pixel/retro game aesthetic theme.

## Early Progress
- The assistant is updating style files and components for the pixel-astro-blog project
- Base.less was already modified with pixel theme CSS variables (--pixel-bg, --pixel-dark, --pixel-accent, etc.) using Press Start 2P and ZCOOL KuaiLe fonts
- The assistant stated styles were done but components and layouts still needed updating
- Head.astro was rewritten with proper meta tags, font links, and theme color #e74c3c
- Header.astro was rewritten with pixel-styled logo, navigation, search, and mobile menu button with glitch animation
- MobileSidebar.astro was rewritten with pixel-styled slide-out menu

## Context for Suffix
- The assistant is systematically rewriting all component files for the pixel-astro-blog project with a consistent pixel/retro game aesthetic
- CSS uses Less with scoped styles, referencing CSS custom properties from Base.less (--pixel-dark, --pixel-accent, --pixel-bg, --pixel-bg-grid, --pixel-purple, etc.)
- Font variables: --pixel-font-title (Press Start 2P), --pixel-font-body (ZCOOL KuaiLe)
- Component pattern: Astro components with frontmatter imports, HTML template, scoped Less styles, and inline scripts
- The assistant mentioned intent to quickly finish all remaining components and push

## Goal
Create a pixel-style Astro blog theme (功能对标 vhAstro-Theme) and deploy it to GitHub Pages at https://3229154448.github.io/pixel-astro-blog/, then redesign it to match a specific reference HTML template's layout, color scheme, and typography. Continuously improve with new features and bug fixes.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Pixel art aesthetic: hard shadows (no blur), thick borders (3-4px solid), zero border-radius, image-rendering: pixelated
- Reference HTML template provided (PixelBlog) — warm light theme with specific colors
- Every modification must be built, verified, and deployed to GitHub
- Font: Press Start 2P (titles) + ZCOOL KuaiLe (body, replacing VT323)
- Color scheme: warm light bg `#e8e0d5`, dark text `#1a1a2e`, red accent `#e74c3c`, green secondary `#27ae60`
- Layout: horizontal article cards (left image, right text), rich sidebar with stats/social/categories/tags/music
- Banner: green bg with floating decorative squares + pixel avatar + typewriter + CRT scanlines + pixel grid bg
- All internal links must use `withBase()` from `src/utils/path.ts` to add `/pixel-astro-blog/` prefix
- Article slugs must use `slugify()` from `src/utils/slug.ts` to strip `.md` suffix

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Created full Astro blog project with 47+ source files
- [x] Deployed to GitHub Pages with Actions CI/CD
- [x] Redesigned all components to match reference HTML template (warm light theme)
- [x] Fixed all internal links missing `/pixel-astro-blog/` base prefix — created `src/utils/path.ts` with `withBase()` function, updated 14+ component/page files
- [x] Added real cover images (3 Unsplash images in `public/assets/images/banner/`) and pixel avatar (ImageMagick-generated PNG)
- [x] Updated blog post frontmatter with cover image paths
- [x] Built complete message board (`src/pages/message/index.astro`): form with name/email/content, 12 mood emojis, 8 avatar colors, reply threads, like/unlike, delete, sort (newest/hottest), keyboard shortcuts, localStorage persistence, 5 demo messages with replies
- [x] Built NES music player (`src/components/MusicPlayer/MusicPlayer.astro`): 5 chiptune tracks (Super Mario, Contra, Zelda, Tetris, Pac-Man) generated via Python numpy → WAV → ffmpeg MP3/OGG, play/pause/prev/next, volume slider, 3 loop modes, progress bar with seek, playlist with active highlight, spinning disc animation
- [x] Fixed about page: added `withBase()` for avatar, enriched content (badges, feature list, tech stack tags), updated outdated VT323 references
- [x] Fixed links/friends pages: `withBase()` for avatar images, unified CSS variables
- [x] Enhanced talking page: added "发布动态" form with live insertion
- [x] Added article detail cover image display with gradient overlay
- [x] Added Konami Code easter egg (↑↑↓↓←→←→BA → 30 lives popup)
- [x] Fixed RSS feed links — added `/pixel-astro-blog/` prefix in `src/pages/rss.xml.ts`
- [x] Fixed search functionality — created `src/pages/vh_static/search.json.ts` to generate search index, updated Search component to use `import.meta.env.BASE_URL`
- [x] Fixed article URLs — removed `.md` suffix via `slugify()` utility, updated all components using `post.id`
- [x] Enhanced mobile sidebar — added avatar, profile info, categories list, tag cloud
- [x] Added Table of Contents (TOC) — `src/components/TOC/TOC.astro`, sticky sidebar with h2-h4 hierarchy, scroll-based active highlighting, click-to-jump
- [x] Added dark/light theme toggle — `src/styles/DarkTheme.less` with neon green CRT aesthetic, ☀️/🌙 button in header, localStorage persistence, achievement trigger
- [x] Added reading progress bar — fixed top red pixel bar with glow effect, scroll-based width
- [x] Added achievement system — `src/components/Achievement/Achievement.astro`, 10 achievements (first-visit, reader, explorer, musician, commenter, konami, dark-side, scroll-master, archiver, social), toast popup with 8-bit sound effect, localStorage tracking, auto-detection + manual trigger via `window.unlockAchievement()`

### In Progress
- [ ] Adding loading animation (user's latest request)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- **Dark→Light theme shift**: Reference HTML uses warm beige `#e8e0d5` background
- **ZCOOL KuaiLe font**: Replaces VT323 for body text per reference template
- **Horizontal article cards**: Left image (2/5 width) + right content (3/5)
- **Rich sidebar**: Stats, social buttons, categories with counts, tag cloud, recommended posts, NES music player
- **CRT + grid effects**: Scanline overlay and pixel grid background on body
- **Green banner**: `#27ae60` background with floating colored squares animation
- **withBase() utility**: All internal links must go through `withBase()` from `src/utils/path.ts` — Astro's `Astro.base` wasn't working for dynamic template strings

- [x] **Fixed esc() and clean_text()**: Added comprehensive cleaning of \xa0, \u3000, \x00, thin spaces, hair spaces, zero-width spaces, soft hyphens, private use chars
- [x] **Fixed split_opts()**: Merged options like `A．2B．3C．4D．5` now correctly split; empty options show `____` placeholder
- [x] **Changed option layout**: From 2x2 table to single-line display (`A．2 B．3 C．4 D．5`) to avoid misalignment
- [x] **Fixed option classification**: Changed `len(text) < 80` to `< 200` for longer options

- [x] **Discovered OMML formula extraction**: omml_utils.py can extract OMML formulas (4833 paragraphs) to Unicode text (e.g., √(2), π, ∈, ⊆)

resolvedSkills.description: 高考化学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中化学、高考化学、物质的量、氧化还原、离子反应、元素周期律、化学键、化学反应与能量、化学反应速率与化学平衡、水溶液中的离子平衡、电化学、有机化学、化学实验、物质结构与性质等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

resolvedSkills.name: yishu-math-100
resolvedSkills.description: 高考数学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中数学、高考数学、集合、函数、导数、三角函数、解三角形、平面向量、复数、数列、立体几何、解析几何、计数原理、概率统计等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>acp-router</name>
    <description>Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.</description>
    <location>/usr/local/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/extensions/acpx/skills/acp-router/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>

    <description>Use when controlling web pages with the OpenClaw browser tool, especially multi-step flows, login checks, tab management, or recovery from stale refs/timeouts.</description>
    <location>/usr/local/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/extensions/browser/skills/browser-automation/SKILL.md</location>

  <skill>

  <skill>

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: browser-automation
resolvedSkills.description: Use when controlling web pages with the OpenClaw browser tool, especially multi-step flows, login checks, tab management, or recovery from stale refs/timeouts.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Audit and harden hosts running OpenClaw for SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, cron checks, and risk posture.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw Android, iOS, or macOS node pairing, QR/setup code, route, auth, and connection failures.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improve
resolvedSkills.description: A pluggable self-improvement framework for AI agents. Automatically learns from mistakes, corrections, and feedback to continuously improve execution quality. resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: yihua-chem-100
resolvedSkills.description: 高考化学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中化学、高考化学、物质的量、氧化还原、离子反应、元素周期律、化学键、化学反应与能量、化学反应速率与化学平衡、水溶液中的离子平衡、电化学、有机化学、化学实验、物质结构与性质等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

resolvedSkills.name: yishu-math-100
resolvedSkills.description: 高考数学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中数学、高考数学、集合、函数、导数、三角函数、解三角形、平面向量、复数、数列、立体几何、解析几何、计数原理、概率统计等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: browser-automation

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media

resolvedSkills.description: 高考数学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中数学、高考数学、集合、函数、导数、三角函数、解三角形、平面向量、复数、数列、立体几何、解析几何、计数原理、概率统计等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

resolvedSkills.description: 高考数学核心方法必刷100讲知识体系。当用户询问高中数学、高考数学、集合、函数、导数、三角函数、解三角形、平面向量、复数、数列、立体几何、解析几何、计数原理、概率统计等话题时使用。支持按章节讲解核心方法、解题技巧、二级结论和真题训练。

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: browser-automation
resolvedSkills.description: Use when controlling web pages with the OpenClaw browser tool, especially multi-step flows, login checks, tab management, or recovery from stale refs/timeouts.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Audit and harden hosts running OpenClaw for SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, cron checks, and risk posture.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw Android, iOS, or macOS node pairing, QR/setup code, route, auth, and connection failures.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improve
resolvedSkills.description: A pluggable self-improvement framework for AI agents. Automatically learns from mistakes, corrections, and feedback to continuously improve execution quality. Runs every 3 days via Cron, extracts reusable experience rules, and proposes improvements to system files with approval workflow.
